navigation.volume_url_pattern: none — each issue has an inconsistent slug; all linked from /issues/
navigation.archive_path: /issues/ lists all volume/issue pages → each issue page lists articles with direct PDF links
navigation.notes:
WordPress (Neve theme). Vol 1 (2013) through Vol 12 (2025). Issue slugs are inconsistent (e.g. /volume-12-iss-2/, /issues/vol5-iss2/, /2014/02/17/vol1-iss1/). PDFs at /wp-content/uploads/. Modern issues (Vol 11+) use
  • Author, Title, Citation
; older issues use

Author, Title

. Title text = PDF anchor text. Registry entry had domain nslj.org but live site is www.nslj.org.
